message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #D9D9E6
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ActorBackgroundColor #D9D9E6
  BoxBorderColor #000000
  BoxBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ArrowColor #000000
}

actor A as A
participant "CircuitBreaker" as CB
actor B as B

alt [no errors]
  A -> CB : call()
  activate CB
  CB -> B : call()
  activate B
  B --> CB : response
  deactivate B
  CB --> A : response
  deactivate CB
else [errors]
  A -> CB : call()
  activate CB

  loop [while err_count < max_errors]
    CB -> B : call()
    destroy B
    CB -> CB : err_count ++
  end

  CB -> CB : sleep(timeout)

  CB -> B : call()
  destroy B
  CB -> CB : sleep(timeout*2)

  CB -> B : call()
  destroy B

  CB --> A : error
  deactivate CB
end
@enduml
```
